# terrible_community_general_openwrt_init (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the service.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the service should start on boot. **At least one** of `state` and `enabled` are required.
- `pattern` (String) If the service does not respond to the `running` command, name a substring to look for as would be found in the output of the `ps` command as a stand-in for a `running` result. If the string is found, the service is assumed to be running.
- `state` (String) `started`/`stopped` are idempotent actions that do not run commands unless necessary. `restarted` always bounces the service. `reloaded` always reloads.
